description: A designed graphic with a black-and-white background image of handcuffed hands. Light blue capitals at top read 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' with '1/28/2025 | New York, NY' beneath. Large white text reads 'Mexican National', followed by 'CRIMES:' and a bulleted list 'Attempted murder' and 'Assault'. An ICE logo is at lower left and a red diagonal banner at lower right reads 'NEW YORK'.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 1/28/2025 New York, NY; Mexican National; CRIMES: Attempted murder; Assault; ICE; NEW YORK
